response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of hands-on fullstack experience with sustained TypeScript/Node.js product work, current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience that directly matches a rare requirement, and demonstrated depth in testing culture (TDD, test-framework authorship, CI/CD, trunk-based development). Cloud (AWS CDK), MongoDB, Docker/Kubernetes, and high-throughput backend work are all evidenced. The main gaps are no stated Nest.js experience, frontend history weighted toward Ember.js over React, and minimal Kotlin exposure — all learnable given the breadth shown.
strengths: Deep, current TypeScript/Node.js fullstack experience across multiple product companies, including pricing systems and high-volume backends
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generation work, matching the JD's AI agent development requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, and delivered teaching/workshops on testing
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, which is core to the primary stack
Frontend experience leans heavily on Ember.js; React exposure appears limited to one role
Kotlin and Python proficiency not demonstrated; secondary-language coverage is thin (Java listed but not recent)

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited recent React
